archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) infused with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
rationale: A 'Super App' combining social, AI, and messaging requires a premium, immersive environment. Dark mode with stark contrast reduces eye strain during heavy usage, makes media (Reels/Feed) pop, and allows the 'Futuristic 3D / AI' elements to glow naturally without looking like a tacky gaming app.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mobile-first standard, max-w-md mx-auto for primary viewports, scaling to a side-by-side bento layout on desktop if applicable.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding for touch targets: p-4 for list items, p-6 for cards. gap-4 for standard lists.

bottom_navigation.style: Glassmorphic floating bar at the bottom of the screen. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-t border-white/10.
bottom_navigation.active_state: Text and icon highlighted in brand.primary, slight scale-up animation.

chats_super_tab.layout: Vertical stack. Top sticky header -> Story Circles (horizontal scroll) -> Chat List (vertical scroll).
chats_super_tab.stories: Compact. h-16 w-16 or h-14 w-14 circles, 2px padding inside the gradient ring to background. Avoid massive logos.
chats_super_tab.chat_list: Merge 1-on-1 chats and groups. Groups should show stacked/overlapping avatars.
chats_super_tab.floating_actions: Include a subtle camera icon (Snapchat lens entry) and Map icon top right or as a floating action button.

feed_tab.style: Clean scrolling feed. Edge-to-edge images/media, sleek interaction buttons (heart, comment, share) underneath, minimalist captions.

reels_tab.style: Immersive, full-screen vertical swipe. Minimal UI overlay to let the video shine. Side-aligned action buttons.

ai_tab.style: Multi-bot workspace. Top horizontal selector for active bot (Emergent, GPT, Claude). Full height chat interface. Use subtle background mesh gradients for the AI personality.
ai_tab.input_bar: Sleek, rounded-full or rounded-2xl glass input field with integrated attachment icon.

profile_tab.layout: Header with avatar/stats -> Tab list (Posts, API Keys, Settings).
profile_tab.api_manager: List of LLM providers. Include input fields for API keys (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Ollama, DeepSeek). Blurred/hidden state for keys by default.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#00B8CC] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle brightness increase and -translate-y-[1px] for cards.
motion_and_interactions.active: Scale down slightly (scale-95) for button presses.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Fade in and slight slide up (10px) on route change.
motion_and_interactions.story_open: Scale up from the circle origin.

logo_3d_futuristic.description: 3D metallic neon shape representing the QuantChat futuristic logo

avatar_ai_bot.description: Glowing head representing the Emergent AI Bot avatar

avatar_user_1.description: Cinematic neon portrait for user avatar or story ring

avatar_user_2.description: Cinematic neon portrait for user avatar or story ring

reels_cover_1.description: Stunning vertical landscape video cover for Reels tab

reels_cover_2.description: Lush green valley vertical cover for Reels tab

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='chat-tab-button', data-testid='story-circle-item').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, tabs, and modals where required.
Use Framer Motion for smooth tab transitions and the bottom nav active state.
DO NOT use a fully transparent header over content; use a glassmorphism blur backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80.
Build the application strictly matching the 'dark' theme setup. Set the Tailwind body background to #050505.
Combine the group and individual chat lists in the 'Chats' view, but keep 'Stories' horizontally scrolling at the top.
The API Key Manager in the Profile tab should have secure hidden inputs for each supported AI provider.
Structure the tabs carefully: 1) Chats, 2) Feed, 3) Reels, 4) AI, 5) Profile.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form elements.
Use '.js' files, not '.tsx' for the React components.
Place the 3D logo generated in the media section prominently but elegantly within the UI (e.g., top header of the chats tab or splash screen).
